titleEn: Peru's blueberry sector reports 30% average annual growth
contentHtml: Luis Miguel Vegas, General Manager of Proarándanos, will present the sector's production figures, varietal evolution, export data, and market projections at the 2026 Trujillo International Blueberry Seminar, scheduled for July 8th and 9th in Trujillo, Peru. Vegas has built a reputation as one of the most…
